{{Quote|Master Ood is gone, but I think he left a descendant!|[[Jem Ysanna]]|<ref name="Dark Empire II 3" />}}
After the ancient [[Neti/Legends|Neti]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ood Bnar]] sacrificed himself to destroy [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]] [[Sedriss QL]] on the planet [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]]<ref name="Dark Empire II 3" /> in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> a Neti '''seedling''' burst out of the ground after his death to preserve Bnar's legacy and watch over Ossus and the ruins of the [[Great Jedi Library/Legends|Great Jedi Library]].<ref name="PotJS">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref>
